inputs.freedom_vision: Being able to introduce myself without leading with the company name.

inputs.attachment: Memories of who my ex used to be in 2019.
inputs.freedom_vision: Walking past our old café without my chest tightening.

inputs.attachment: The promotion I have been working toward for two years.
inputs.freedom_vision: Doing excellent work whether or not it lands a title change.

inputs.attachment: My parents' approval of my career choices.
inputs.freedom_vision: Choosing a path because it is mine, even if they never understand it.

inputs.attachment: Checking my phone the moment I wake up.
inputs.freedom_vision: Twenty minutes of silence before the first input.

inputs.attachment: अपनी माँ की आवाज़ की रिकॉर्डिंग को बार-बार सुनना
inputs.freedom_vision: उनकी याद के साथ शांति में जीना, दर्द में नहीं

inputs.attachment: Being the smartest person in every conversation.
inputs.freedom_vision: Listening for ten minutes before I speak.
